mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS id, o.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, o.quantity AS quantity, o.operator AS operator, o.create_time AS createTime FROM outbound_order o INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = o.product_id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC, o.id DESC

SELECT o.id AS id, o.product_id AS productId, p.product_code AS productCode, p.product_name AS productName, o.quantity AS quantity, o.operator AS operator, o.create_time AS createTime FROM outbound_order o INNER JOIN product p ON p.id = o.product_id WHERE o.id = #{id}
